title: WiseTech Academy LMS Architecture
summary: Architected and delivered core LMS components across billing, integrations, proctoring, and CI/CD pipelines to improve platform extensibility, release reliability, and operational scalability.

title: CargoWise Integration and ETL Orchestration
summary: Designed and built ETL-driven integration workflows for XML and document exchange between CargoWise and external ecosystems including customs, government agencies, ocean liners, and air transport providers.

title: MyMissionHub Release Automation
summary: Designed and implemented GitHub Actions release automation with auto version bumping, artifact packaging, and deployment flow controls to reduce manual release overhead.

title: WiseTech Academy Core Platform Delivery
summary: Led core component design and development for WiseTech Academy LMS domains including billing, integrations, and proctoring, with delivery patterns aligned to scalable CI/CD operations.

title: AI-Guided Team Workflow Integration
summary: Rolled out instruction-governed, persona-based AI collaboration patterns to improve consistency across architecture, development, QA, and release operations.

title: Enterprise Platform Transition Leadership
summary: Led modernization planning and implementation across integration, web, and data layers, balancing technical debt reduction against ongoing delivery commitments.
